title: arctium minus
intro: Arctium minus, also known as lesser burdock or wild burdock, is a biennial herbaceous plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids, tannins, and essential oils. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Arctium minus is often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or salve, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions, wounds, and insect bites.
